description_long: This cathedral is a grand stone structure featuring a central nave, two prominent square bell towers at the front, and a tall, slender spire rising from the crossing. The exterior is adorned with flying buttresses along the sides and rear, supporting the high vaulted roof and adding to the Gothic architectural character. The main facade is richly detailed, with three large arched entry portals, a rose window above the central entrance, and vertical elements such as pinnacles and columns. The side elevations reveal tall, narrow windows and additional buttresses, while the rear showcases a polygonal apse surrounded by radiating chapels and more flying buttresses. The roof is steeply pitched and covered in dark slate tiles, contrasting with the lighter stone walls. Overall, the structure exudes a sense of verticality, intricacy, and historical grandeur typical of medieval European cathedrals.
description: A large, intricately detailed Gothic cathedral with twin front towers, a central spire, flying buttresses, and ornate stonework. The structure features arched portals, a rose window, and a steep slate roof.
description_view_0: The rear view highlights the polygonal apse, radiating chapels, and extensive flying buttresses supporting the back of the cathedral.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the length of the nave, the tall spire, and the repetitive pattern of buttresses and windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: The front view showcases the twin square bell towers, three arched entry portals, a large rose window, and the main decorative facade.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the nave, spire, and buttresses, but also reveals a secondary entrance and additional architectural details.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: The main facade is richly decorated with pointed arches, a large rose window, and vertical columns. There are also sculptural elements and tracery typical of Gothic cathedrals.
attribute_entry_portal_design: The main entry portal features three large pointed arches, each with ornate stonework and recessed columns. The central portal is flanked by sculptural details and surmounted by a rose window.
